content.en:
Hall of Void Source.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to fuse those eternal ancestral endowments as soon as possible.

As time slowly passed, the Eternal Ancestor Fu of the Gate fused.

After a long time, Ye Tian fused into a sect of immortal ancestors.

When Ye Tian's body obtained these immortal ancestral endowments, his potential was even higher.

And if he creates the Eternal Technique in the future, it will be even easier.

Especially the Immortal Immortal Ancestral Endowment, this Immortal Ancestral Endowment has a certain correlation with the Endless Eternal Body, because the Endless Eternal Body has fused with the Ancient Star Eternal Body, and the Ancient Star Eternal Body actually has the power of immortality, which can have such a powerful life-saving ability.

And now, Ye Tian had obtained the Immortal Immortal Ancestral Endowment, which helped him cultivate the Endless Eternal Body.

The fusion talent had been completed, and Ye Tian began to cultivate the Endless Eternal Body.

This time, he obtained a lot of resources that would help improve the Endless Eternal Body, such as the Yuanqing Eternal Stone, so he naturally wanted to cultivate the Endless Eternal Body and strive to cultivate it to the consummation realm.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to refine the Yuanqing Eternal Liquid.

That large piece of Yuanqing Eternal Stone quickly refined some Yuanqing Eternal Liquid, and some other resources also refined substances that would help improve the Endless Eternal Body.

"Start cultivating the Endless Eternal Body!"

Ye Tian swallowed a mouthful of Yuanqing Eternal Liquid, and the Endless Eternal Body began to absorb the energy of Yuanqing Eternal Liquid.

And at this time, the Immortal Immortal Ancestral Fu played a certain role, allowing Ye Tian's utilization rate of Yuanqing Eternal Liquid to increase a lot, which made Ye Tian a little surprised.

As the Yuanqing Eternal Liquid continued to be consumed, Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body continued to improve.

Gradually, the Endless Eternal Body was promoted to the peak realm of the late stage of Dacheng.

At this time, Ye Tian had already consumed a lot of matter, and he was only one step away from the consummation of the Endless Eternal Body, but this step was difficult to complete, and he needed a lot of resources.

Fortunately, Ye Tian was lucky, before these substances were completely exhausted, Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body was finally consummated.

As soon as the Endless Eternal Body was consummated, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

Moreover, the resources Ye Tian obtained from the Primordial Sea this time were enough for him to cultivate to the Sevenfold Supreme Realm, and it could easily help him break the shackles, but it was still a little difficult to hit the Eightfold Supreme Realm.

On the other side, Ye Tian's Black Mist Worm clone in the Primordial Sea was looking for various resources.

-----------------

Primordial Sea.

At this moment, there are already black fog insects all over the place, and Ye Tian can dominate other black fog insects wherever he goes, he is the king of black fog insects.

All kinds of precious resources were put away by Ye Tian and existed in a void opened up in his body.

this day.

Ye Tian discovered an incomparably precious treasure—the Void True Liquid.

The true liquid of nothingness is in the form of a liquid of nothingness, with vague fluctuations of eternal rules, but the main characteristic is that it will become a real void when it encounters the eternal rules.

That is to say, the attack of the Eternal Rule cannot touch it, and once an external Eternal Rule touches it, it will disappear completely, as if it does not exist between heaven and earth, there is no eternal rule between the Eternal Rules, and even a half-step Eternal Realm cannot spy on its existence.

And once the Eternal Rule attack leaves where it is, it will reappear.

Therefore, it is still very easy to identify the true liquid of nothingness.

"I actually found the Void True Liquid, if those Ninefold Supreme Beings knew about it, I am afraid they would go crazy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He immediately put away the Void Liquid and stored it properly.

The Void True Liquid can help any Ninefold Supreme Immortal Ascendant to impact the Half-Step Eternal Realm, and it is the last hope for some Ninefold Supreme Beings who have used a treasure similar to the Primordial Source Liquid.

Ye Tian didn't really need the Void True Liquid, but there were definitely people in the Terran who needed it, such as his relatives.

He didn't think that his relatives would be able to rely on themselves to cultivate to the half-step Eternal Realm, and in the end, he was afraid that he would have to rely on the Void True Liquid.

Therefore, just one serving of Void True Liquid, he still felt that it was not enough.

After obtaining the Void True Liquid, Ye Tian's luck seemed to be getting better and better.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to obtain an extremely precious treasure in the Primordial Sea again—the Primordial Tree!

The primordial leaf is a treasure born from the primordial tree, a primordial leaf can carry the Supreme One into the primordial sea, and the primordial tree has ten leaves, and the primordial tree also has a special use.

It's a pity that Ye Tian didn't know the use of the Primordial Tree.

Still, he collected the ten leaves.

As for the Primordial Tree, he didn't take it with him, but stayed here until he figured out what the Primordial Tree was for, and it was not too late to come back when the time came.

In the following days, Ye Tian obtained many, many resources, many of which were useful for the half-step Eternal Realm.

In the entire primordial sea, there is no supreme person competing with Ye Tian, this is his home field.

And the Black Mist Worms don't have much intelligence, and they don't need those resources.

At this time, Ye Tian was thinking about how good it would be if the black fog worm could come out!

Then, he didn't have to worry about the resources of cultivating to the half-step Eternal Realm at all, and he could even help the human race cultivate multiple half-step Eternal Realms.

The years have passed.

Ye Tian had almost visited most of the area of the Primordial Sea, in fact, many resources had been collected by the Supreme Beings who came in last time, after all, there were many Supreme Beings who entered here, and the speed at which they collected them was also very fast.

However, the amount of resources Ye Tian found was still extremely terrifying, far exceeding Ye Tian's expectations.

Among them, there are two drops of the Void True Liquid, one Primordial Tree, one Eternal Immortal Holy Flower, three Eternal Enlightenment Flowers, and 109 Immortal Primordial Stones.

These belong to the most harvested batch of treasures.

Among them, the Eternal Enlightenment Flower can make the half-step Eternal Realm produce the effect of epiphany, which is of great value.

And the Eternal Immortal Sacred Flower can heal all injuries, even the fatal injuries of the half-step Eternal Realm can be healed with the Eternal Immortal Flower.

The Immortal Primordial Stone is an incomparably hard thing that can be used to create Eternal Origin Weapons, while after the half-step Eternal Realm, there are relatively few people who have Eternal Origin Weapons.

And so many Immortal Primordial Stones are enough to create a lot of Eternal Origin Weapons.

As for other resources, the list goes on.

What's more, these are the treasures that the Supreme and the Half-Step Eternal Realm have missed.

As the long years passed, more treasures would be born in the primordial sea, and Ye Tian would be able to harvest another wave of resources at that time.

Abrupt.

On this day, there were some changes in the Primordial Sea, and a large number of black fog insects received some kind of traction and flew towards a certain location in the Primordial Sea.

Ye Tian was able to resist this kind of traction, but he still followed it.

He wondered what was the source of this so-called traction?
